'''mowazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jejunocecal|jejunocecal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jejunocecal|jejunocecal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mowazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowazithi|mowazithi]] || [[word:mowaziji|mowaziji]] || [[word:mowazishi|mowazishi]] || [[word:mowaziki|mowaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowazuthuthu|mowazuthuthu]] || [[word:mowazujuju|mowazujuju]] || [[word:mowazushushu|mowazushushu]] || [[word:mowazukuku|mowazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowazuthu|mowazuthu]] || [[word:mowazuju|mowazuju]] || [[word:mowazushu|mowazushu]] || [[word:mowazuku|mowazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowazufthuf|mowazufthuf]] || [[word:mowazufjuf|mowazufjuf]] || [[word:mowazufshuf|mowazufshuf]] || [[word:mowazufkuf|mowazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowazethe|mowazethe]] || [[word:mowazeje|mowazeje]] || [[word:mowazeshe|mowazeshe]] || [[word:mowazeke|mowazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowazothotho|mowazothotho]] || [[word:mowazojojo|mowazojojo]] || [[word:mowazoshosho|mowazoshosho]] || [[word:mowazokoko|mowazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowazotho|mowazotho]] || [[word:mowazojo|mowazojo]] || [[word:mowazosho|mowazosho]] || [[word:mowazoko|mowazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowazofthof|mowazofthof]] || [[word:mowazofjof|mowazofjof]] || [[word:mowazofshof|mowazofshof]] || [[word:mowazofkof|mowazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfthÃŸf|mowazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfjÃŸf|mowazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfshÃŸf|mowazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfkÃŸf|mowazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mowazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mowazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mowazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mowazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfthÃŸf|mowazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfjÃŸf|mowazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfshÃŸf|mowazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfkÃŸf|mowazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfthÃŸf|mowazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfjÃŸf|mowazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfshÃŸf|mowazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mowazÃŸfkÃŸf|mowazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowazÃḊthÃḊ|mowazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mowazÃḊjÃḊ|mowazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mowazÃḊshÃḊ|mowazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mowazÃḊkÃḊ|mowazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowazathatha|mowazathatha]] || [[word:mowazajaja|mowazajaja]] || [[word:mowazashasha|mowazashasha]] || [[word:mowazakaka|mowazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowazatha|mowazatha]] || [[word:mowazaja|mowazaja]] || [[word:mowazasha|mowazasha]] || [[word:mowazaka|mowazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowazafthaf|mowazafthaf]] || [[word:mowazafjaf|mowazafjaf]] || [[word:mowazafshaf|mowazafshaf]] || [[word:mowazafkaf|mowazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mowazasha|mowazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mowazshÃḋasha|mowazshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mowazroasha|mowazroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mowazmuasha|mowazmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mowazyaasha|mowazyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomowaznkshÃḋasha|gomowaznkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomowaznkroasha|gomowaznkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomowaznkmuasha|gomowaznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomowaznkyaasha|gomowaznkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mowawazasha|mowawazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mowawazshÃḋasha|mowawazshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mowawazroasha|mowawazroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mowawazmuasha|mowawazmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mowawazyaasha|mowawazyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomowawaznkshÃḋasha|gomowawaznkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomowawaznkroasha|gomowawaznkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomowawaznkmuasha|gomowawaznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomowawaznkyaasha|gomowawaznkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mewÃḊzasha|mewÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mewÃḊzshÃḋasha|mewÃḊzshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mewÃḊzroasha|mewÃḊzroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mewÃḊzmuasha|mewÃḊzmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mewÃḊzyaasha|mewÃḊzyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomewÃḊznkshÃḋasha|gomewÃḊznkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomewÃḊznkroasha|gomewÃḊznkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomewÃḊznkmuasha|gomewÃḊznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomewÃḊznkyaasha|gomewÃḊznkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mowfazasha|mowfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mowfazshÃḋasha|mowfazshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mowfazroasha|mowfazroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mowfazmuasha|mowfazmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mowfazyaasha|mowfazyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomowfaznkshÃḋasha|gomowfaznkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomowfaznkroasha|gomowfaznkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomowfaznkmuasha|gomowfaznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomowfaznkyaasha|gomowfaznkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
